name: chr22_22q11_21_LCR22D_breakpoint_cluster
description: LCR22-D, a ~700 kb SD block at chr22:21.5-22.2 Mb (GRCh38). Distal breakpoint of the canonical 3 Mb DiGeorge deletion (A-D NAHR). LCR22-D is the largest and most complex LCR22 module, containing GGT/USP18/BCRP/POM121L paralogs in mixed orientation; structural haplotype diversity makes long-read assembly essential for resolution.

architecture.internal_structure: Largest LCR22, complex GGT/USP18/BCRP/POM121L mosaic in direct+inverted orientation; multiple sub-haplotypes (LCR22-D-1 through D-6) characterised by long-read sequencing.
